Services

What Can I
Paint For You?

€olean;

Custom Sneakers

Every pair is one of a kind. From subtle colour corrections to full narrative customs. Nothing gets repeated.

🚘

Automotive Art

Hood murals, full panels, interior detail. Your car becomes the rarest thing on the road.

⛑

Helmets & Gear

Racing helmets, motorcycle gear, skate lids. Protection does not have to look plain.

🎨

Murals & Objects

Walls, furniture, instruments, trophies. If it has a surface, it has potential.

How It Works

The Process

01

Consult

We talk vision, object, budget, timeline. Nothing starts without clarity on both sides.

02

Design

A detailed mock-up is built for approval. You see exactly what you are getting before paint touches anything.

03

Paint

Purely hand-painted. No stencils, no shortcuts. Process photos shared throughout.

04

Seal

Professional-grade finish applied. Packaged carefully, shipped or collected. Done right, lasts forever.

About

Berlin's
Most Dangerous
Painter.

I built DDB out of one obsession: objects with no identity deserve one. I paint surfaces into stories. Based in Berlin, working for clients across 10+ countries. Every project starts from scratch. Nothing gets recycled. Nothing gets repeated.

Years

Client Love

They Said It,
Not Me.

DDB painted my AF1s and now I physically cannot wear anything else. Three cities, stopped every single time. That is not paint, that is a conversation starter.

Marcus L.

Custom Air Force 1s — Berlin

I sent the worst reference images, just vibes, no clarity. DDB came back with something so beyond what I imagined I could not speak. My car is genuinely art now.

Yemi A.

BMW Hood Mural — Lagos

The helmet arrived and I sat with it 20 minutes before I could put it on my head. Still cannot decide if I want to wear it or frame it. Most likely both.

Sasha K.

Racing Helmet — Vienna
